entries.note: V57-B consumes the shipped V57-A observation and local-effect conformance surfaces unchanged by default.
V57-B narrows the first restoration exemplar to compensating restore of the shipped create_new artifact only.
V57-B defines replay as bounded recomputation and re-evaluation of the restoration event against the prior observed-effect lineage only.
V57-B treats the original ticket as lineage only, not ambient ongoing authority, and requires an explicit bounded compensating-scope match.
V57-B adds one evidence-bearing restoration record without mutating live behavior by default.
